template: Prompt:"Act as a Lead System Designer. I want to design a {{system_name__e_g___weapon_resonance_system}}.​Inputs: > - Genre: {{e_g___action_rpg}}​Player Goal: {{e_g___vertical_power_progression}}​Task: > Please provide a structural design covering:​Primary Loop: How players interact with this system daily.​System Constraints: Resource sinks and fountains.​Interconnectivity: How this system feeds into the {{combat_economy}} system.​Scalability: How to add new content to this system in the next 2 years without breaking balance."
